name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.singleton_self_rdiv_derivable
constType: ∀ (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp), Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [A] (A.rdiv (A.ldiv A))

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_sequent_degree_bound_000005_is_false
constType:
¬∀ {Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp} {A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp},
    Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Γ A →
      Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.tp_degree A ≤ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.list_degree Γ

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_singleton_sequent_eq_000002_is_false
constType: ¬∀ {A B : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp}, Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [A] B ↔ A = B

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_singleton_atom_derivation_shape_000009_is_false
constType:
¬∀ {s : String} {A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp},
    Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s] A →
      ∃ Δ,
        Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Δ (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s) ∧
          (A =
              (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s).rdiv
                (List.foldl Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.ldiv (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s) Δ) ∨
            A = List.foldr Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.rdiv (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s) Δ)

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.atom_count
constType: Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → ℕ

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.atom_count_list
constType: List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → ℕ

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_atom_count_bounded_by_context_000010_is_false
constType:
¬∀ {Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp} {A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp},
    Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Γ A →
      AutomatedTheoryConstruction.atom_count A ≤ AutomatedTheoryConstruction.atom_count_list Γ

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.singleton_nonatom_sequent_cases_forward
constType:
∀ {A C : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp},
  Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [A] C →
    ¬Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.is_atom C →
      (∃ B D, C = B.ldiv D ∧ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [B, A] D) ∨
        ∃ B D, C = D.rdiv B ∧ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [A, B] D

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_singleton_nonatom_derivation_shape_000013
constType:
∀ {s : String} {A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp},
  Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s] A ∧
      ¬Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.is_atom A →
    (∃ B C, A = B.ldiv C ∧ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [B, Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s] C) ∨
      ∃ B C, A = C.rdiv B ∧ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s, B] C

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_singleton_atomic_sequent_iff_000011
constType:
∀ {A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp} {s : String},
  Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [A] (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s) ↔
    A = Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_singleton_atom_sequent_iff_000018
constType:
∀ {s : String} {A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp},
  Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s] A ↔
    A = Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s ∨
      (∃ B C, A = B.ldiv C ∧ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [B, Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s] C) ∨
        ∃ B C, A = C.rdiv B ∧ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s, B] C

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_singleton_sequent_iff_cases_000022
constType:
∀ {A C : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp},
  Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [A] C ↔
    A = C ∨
      (∃ B D, C = B.ldiv D ∧ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [B, A] D) ∨
        ∃ B D, C = D.rdiv B ∧ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent [A, B] D

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_atom_context_sequent_cases_000023
constType:
∀ {Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp} {A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp},
  (∀ x ∈ Γ, Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.is_atom x) →
    (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Γ A ↔
      (∃ s, A = Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s ∧ Γ = [Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s]) ∨
        (Γ ≠ [] ∧ ∃ B C, A = B.ldiv C ∧ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent ([B] ++ Γ) C) ∨
          Γ ≠ [] ∧ ∃ B C, A = C.rdiv B ∧ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent (Γ ++ [B]) C)

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_atom_goal_candidate_cases_000007
constType:
∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (s : String),
  Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Γ (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s) →
    Γ = [Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s] ∨
      ∃ c ∈ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.candidates Γ,
        match c with
        | Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Cand.rdiv L B A Δ Λ =>
          Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Δ A ∧
            Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent (L ++ [B] ++ Λ) (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s)
        | Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Cand.ldiv Gamma1 Δ A B R =>
          Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Δ A ∧
            Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent (Gamma1 ++ [B] ++ R) (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s)

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.occurs_atom
constType: String → Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Prop

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_occurs_atom_from_context_000021_is_false
constType:
¬∀ {Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp} {A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp} {t : String},
    Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Γ A →
      AutomatedTheoryConstruction.occurs_atom t A → ∃ B ∈ Γ, AutomatedTheoryConstruction.occurs_atom t B

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.support_ok
constType: List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Prop

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.support_ok_replace
constType:
∀ {Γ L R Λ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp} {B B' C : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp},
  (∀ (s : String), AutomatedTheoryConstruction.occurs_atom s B → AutomatedTheoryConstruction.occurs_atom s B') →
    AutomatedTheoryConstruction.support_ok (Γ ++ [B] ++ Λ) C →
      AutomatedTheoryConstruction.support_ok (Γ ++ L ++ [B'] ++ R ++ Λ) C

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.support_ok_self_singleton
constType: ∀ (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp), AutomatedTheoryConstruction.support_ok [A] A

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_derivable_support_ok_000032
constType:
∀ {Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp} {A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp},
  Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Γ A → AutomatedTheoryConstruction.support_ok Γ A

  AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicCandidateTree Γ s ↔
    Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Γ (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s)

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SupportClosure
constType: List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Prop

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_support_closure_matches_support_ok_000036
constType:
∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp),
  AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SupportClosure Γ A ↔ AutomatedTheoryConstruction.support_ok Γ A

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.supportClosure_atom_iff_occurs_in_context
constType:
∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (s : String),
  AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SupportClosure Γ (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s) ↔
    ∃ B ∈ Γ, AutomatedTheoryConstruction.occurs_atom s B

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.CandidateTree
constType: List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Prop

constType:
∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp),
  AutomatedTheoryConstruction.CandidateTree Γ A ↔ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Γ A

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.candidateTree_atom_iff_atomicCandidateTree
constType:
∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (s : String),
  AutomatedTheoryConstruction.CandidateTree Γ (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom s) ↔
    AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicCandidateTree Γ s

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.supportClosure_ldiv_atom_counterexample
constType:
AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SupportClosure
    [(Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom "p").ldiv (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom "p")]
    (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom "p") ∧
  ¬Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent
      [(Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom "p").ldiv (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom "p")]
      (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp.atom "p")

∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp),

constType:

constType: Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Option Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Left.Tp

constType: Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Option Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Right.Tp

constType: List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Prop

constType: List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Prop

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.exists_left_tp_of_isLeftOnly
constType:
∀ {A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp},
  AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isLeftOnly A →
    ∃ AL, AutomatedTheoryConstruction.toLeftTp? A = some AL ∧ AL.toProductFree = A

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.exists_right_tp_of_isRightOnly
constType:
∀ {A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp},
  AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isRightOnly A →
    ∃ AR, AutomatedTheoryConstruction.toRightTp? A = some AR ∧ AR.toProductFree = A

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.exists_left_ctx_of_allLeftOnly
constType:
∀ {Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp},
  (∀ x ∈ Γ, AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isLeftOnly x) →
    ∃ ΓL, AutomatedTheoryConstruction.toLeftCtx? Γ = some ΓL ∧ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Left.ctxToProductFree ΓL = Γ

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.exists_right_ctx_of_allRightOnly
constType:
∀ {Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp},
  (∀ x ∈ Γ, AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isRightOnly x) →
    ∃ ΓR,
      AutomatedTheoryConstruction.toRightCtx? Γ = some ΓR ∧ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Right.ctxToProductFree ΓR = Γ

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_full_one_sided_conservativity_000042
constType:
(∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp),
    (∀ x ∈ Γ, AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isLeftOnly x) →
      AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isLeftOnly A →
        (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Γ A ↔ AutomatedTheoryConstruction.leftTranslatedSequent Γ A)) ∧
  ∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp),
    (∀ x ∈ Γ, AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isRightOnly x) →
      AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isRightOnly A →
        (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Γ A ↔ AutomatedTheoryConstruction.rightTranslatedSequent Γ A)

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.residualAtomicState
constType:
List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp →
  Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Option (List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp × String)

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_residual_support_normal_form_000050
constType:
∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp),
  (AutomatedTheoryConstruction.HandedSupportClosure Γ A ↔
      ∃ Δ s,
        AutomatedTheoryConstruction.residualAtomicState Γ A = some (Δ, s) ∧
          AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicCandidateTree Δ s) ∧
    (AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SupportClosure Γ A ↔
      ∃ Δ s,
        AutomatedTheoryConstruction.residualAtomicState Γ A = some (Δ, s) ∧
          ∃ B ∈ Δ, AutomatedTheoryConstruction.occurs_atom s B)

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.leftHandedSupportClosure
constType: List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Left.Tp → Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Left.Tp → Prop

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.rightHandedSupportClosure
constType: List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Right.Tp → Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Right.Tp → Prop

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.leftTranslatedHandedSupportClosure
constType: List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Prop

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.rightTranslatedHandedSupportClosure
constType: List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → Prop

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.left_handed_support_closure_iff_handed_support_closure
constType:
∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Left.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Left.Tp),
  AutomatedTheoryConstruction.leftHandedSupportClosure Γ A ↔
    AutomatedTheoryConstruction.HandedSupportClosure (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Left.ctxToProductFree Γ)
      A.toProductFree

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.right_handed_support_closure_iff_handed_support_closure
constType:
∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Right.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Right.Tp),
  AutomatedTheoryConstruction.rightHandedSupportClosure Γ A ↔
    AutomatedTheoryConstruction.HandedSupportClosure (Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Right.ctxToProductFree Γ)
      A.toProductFree

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.leftHandedSupportClosure_iff_sequent
constType:
∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Left.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Left.Tp),
  AutomatedTheoryConstruction.leftHandedSupportClosure Γ A ↔ Γ ⇒ A

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.rightHandedSupportClosure_iff_sequent
constType:
∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Right.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Right.Tp),
  AutomatedTheoryConstruction.rightHandedSupportClosure Γ A ↔ Γ ⇒ A

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_one_sided_handed_conservativity_000051
constType:
(∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp),
    (∀ x ∈ Γ, AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isLeftOnly x) →
      AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isLeftOnly A →
        (AutomatedTheoryConstruction.HandedSupportClosure Γ A ↔
          AutomatedTheoryConstruction.leftTranslatedHandedSupportClosure Γ A)) ∧
  ∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp),
    (∀ x ∈ Γ, AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isRightOnly x) →
      AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isRightOnly A →
        (AutomatedTheoryConstruction.HandedSupportClosure Γ A ↔
          AutomatedTheoryConstruction.rightTranslatedHandedSupportClosure Γ A)

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_sequent_iff_residual_atomic_witness
constType:
∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp),
  Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Γ A ↔
    ∃ Δ s,
      AutomatedTheoryConstruction.residualAtomicState Γ A = some (Δ, s) ∧
        AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicCandidateTree Δ s

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_residual_candidate_tree_bijection_000055
constType:
∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp),
  ∃ (reconstruct :
    ∀
      (a :
        { p //
          AutomatedTheoryConstruction.residualAtomicState Γ A = some p ∧
            AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicCandidateTree p.1 p.2 }),
      AutomatedTheoryConstruction.CandidateTree Γ A),
    Function.Bijective reconstruct

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicResidualState
constType: Type

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicResidualGraphStep
constType: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicResidualState → AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicResidualState → Prop

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicResidualGraphAccepts
constType: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicResidualState → Prop

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.atomicResidualGraphAccepts_iff_atomicCandidateTree
constType:
∀ {Δ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp} {s : String},
  AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicResidualGraphAccepts (Δ, s) ↔ AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicCandidateTree Δ s

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_residual_graph_recognizes_sequent_000062
constType:
∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp),
  Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Sequent Γ A ↔
    ∃ Δ s,
      AutomatedTheoryConstruction.residualAtomicState Γ A = some (Δ, s) ∧
        AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicResidualGraphAccepts (Δ, s)

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicBranchLength
constType: List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp → String → ℕ → Prop

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_residual_atomic_branch_bound_000057
constType:
∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp)
  (Δ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (s : String),
  AutomatedTheoryConstruction.residualAtomicState Γ A = some (Δ, s) →
    AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicCandidateTree Δ s →
      ∀ (n : ℕ), AutomatedTheoryConstruction.AtomicBranchLength Δ s n → n ≤ Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.list_degree Δ

name: AutomatedTheoryConstruction.thm_same_handed_support_exactness_000059_is_false
constType:
¬((∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp),
      (∀ x ∈ Γ, AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isLeftOnly x) →
        AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isLeftOnly A →
          (AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SupportClosure Γ A ↔ AutomatedTheoryConstruction.HandedSupportClosure Γ A)) ∧
    ∀ (Γ : List Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp) (A : Mathling.Lambek.ProductFree.Tp),
      (∀ x ∈ Γ, AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isRightOnly x) →
        AutomatedTheoryConstruction.isRightOnly A →
          (AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SupportClosure Γ A ↔ AutomatedTheoryConstruction.HandedSupportClosure Γ A))
